name: Historic Preservation Intake
description: Historic preservation project intake and compliance assessment. Evaluates a project's historic designation status, Secretary of the Interior's Standards compliance posture, tax credit eligibility, and proposed scope to produce a preservation profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended actions before design or regulatory submission.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Historic Preservation Report
types.description: Generated historic preservation report from intake session data.
